name: Sematext
description: Sematext — Full-stack monitoring and log management SaaS combining metrics, logs, traces, and real user monitoring.

seo.title: Sematext — Performance Monitoring / APM
seo.meta_description: Sematext: Sematext — Full-stack monitoring and log management SaaS combining metrics, logs, traces, and real user monitoring.

when_to_use: Full-stack APM with logs, metrics, and RUM in one SaaS
Log management with anomaly detection and alerting
Real user monitoring for web app performance tracking
Kubernetes and Docker container monitoring dashboards

pros: Metrics, logs, traces, and RUM in one SaaS
cons: Depth per module is less than best-of-breed tools
UI and UX feel dated in places
Community and ecosystem smaller than incumbents
review.verdict: Reasonable full-stack observability for SMBs on a budget; large orgs will outgrow it into Datadog or Grafana stacks.
review.best_for: SMBs wanting metrics, logs, and traces at a fraction of Datadog cost
review.not_for: Enterprises needing deep AIOps and best-in-class per module

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence
